name: 25"x65" Decorative Forged Metal Floor Mirror Black - Threshold™
description:
This Decorative Forged Floor Mirror from Threshold™ makes an elegant addition to any space. This leaning floor mirror features a metal frame powder coated in a black finish for a subtle yet sophisticated touch. Designed in a rectangular shape, this mirror gives your space a welcoming look as well as a place to check your appearance before you head out the door.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
